ddls:
CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of content the comment is on */,
  "object_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content object the comment is related to */,
  "parent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment if it is a reply */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was submitted */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was last modified */,
  "date_approved" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was approved */,
  "comment" TEXT /* The text content of the comment */,
  "markup" INTEGER /* Markup language used for the comment */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the comment is public */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the comment has been approved */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who submitted the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the comment (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "spam_score" INTEGER /* Score from automated spam filters */,
  "reported_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  "last_editor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the last user who edited the comment */,
  "last_editor_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the last editor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_content_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_type_id") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_parent_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_object_id FOREIGN KEY ("object_id") REFERENCES objects ("object_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_last_editor_id FOREIGN KEY ("last_editor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the content type is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content object */,
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content object */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the content object */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the content object is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the content object was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the user */,
  "role" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., regular user, moderator, admin) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment being modified */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  "date_modified" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was modified */,
  "previous_comment" TEXT /* Previous version of the comment text */,
  "current_comment" TEXT /* Current version of the comment text */,
  "status_changed" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the status of the comment was changed */,
  "is_reverted" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the comment was reverted to a previous version */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions associated with the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderation_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation log entry */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the action was taken on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who took the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, edit, delete) */,
  "date_taken" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was taken */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the moderation action */,
  "is_automated" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the action was taken by an automated system */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the moderation action (e.g., minor, major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderation_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
